title: Windrush Compensation Scheme data: November 2022
body: "This document contains data on:   number of Windrush Compensation Scheme claims received breakdown of claims by country of residence breakdown of claims by country of nationality number of people referred by the Windrush Compensation Scheme to the claimant assistance provider value of Windrush Compensation Scheme payments made number of negative outcomes volume of tier one and tier two reviews and outcome volumes  "
